revision.text: importScript("User:Daduxing/familytree.js");
mw.loader.load("https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Daduxing/familytree.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript");

mw.loader.load("https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Daduxing/familytree.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript"); mw.loader.load("https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=User:Qwertyytrewqqwerty/DisamAssist.js&action=raw&ctype=text/javascript");

revision.comment: Undo revision [[Special:Diff/160865|160865]] by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) I think this broke hotcat
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
